scenarios.description: parse(String html, String baseUri) with simple HTML returns Document with body child element
scenarios.expectedResult:
Document returned such that doc.body().html() == "

Hello

" and baseUri resolves relative links properly

scenarios.description: parse(String html) with empty body returns Document with empty body and default baseUri
scenarios.expectedResult: Document returned such that doc.body().html().isEmpty() and doc.baseUri() == ""

scenarios.description: parse(String html, Parser parser) using custom parser stub is invoked correctly
scenarios.precondition: Parser stub implemented to record invocation and return dummy Document
scenarios.expectedResult: Parser.parseInput called once with html and empty baseUri; returned Document stub is returned
pseudocode: TEST TC03 parse with custom parser
String html = "<x/>"; Parser parser = new Parser(){ public Document parseInput(String h, String b){ record(h,b); return dummyDoc;} };
assert parser invocation recorded args ("<x/>",""); assert result == dummyDoc;

scenarios.description: parse(String html, String baseUri, Parser parser) with null html throws NullPointerException
pseudocode: TEST TC04 parse null html throws
String html = null; String baseUri = "base"; Parser parser = Parser.htmlParser();

scenarios.description: parse(String html, String baseUri) with relative link in html and no <base> uses provided baseUri for resolution
pseudocode: TEST TC05 parse relative URL resolution

scenarios.description: parse(String html, String baseUri) with malformed HTML still produces balanced Document
